review_body_text: Maybank Investment Bank offers excellent learning, supportive seniors, and ample growth opportunities—an enriching environment to thrive in. Would recommend for graduates
Joined as a student ambassador and got to involve into the GenM Summit. Fun activity though. Maybank academy was quie a nice place and surprised they had buffet there.

It was a decent experienced depending on your department and manager, unfortunately there was no proper training for protege and often being negleted. Theres also a power trip going on between older and younger fresh grad staff. Good for expanding connections and networking.

Maybank provides a supportive team environment and strong professional growth opportunities. Work-life balance can be challenging, but competitive benefits and a focus on employee well-being compensate.

Title: Maybank - A Superb Workplace My experience at Maybank has been truly outstanding, and here's why it stands out as an exceptional workplace: 1. **Inclusive Culture**: Maybank fosters diversity and inclusion, creating a strong sense of belonging among employees. 2. **Supportive Management**: Maybank's leadership is approachable and values employee feedback. 3. **Work-Life Balance**: The company promotes work-life balance, offering flexibility and wellness support. 4. **Growth Opportunities**: Maybank invests in professional development and career advancement. 5. **Competitive Benefits**: They offer competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package. 6. **Innovation**: Maybank embraces innovation and technology, keeping the work dynamic. 7. **Community Engagement**: Maybank encourages community involvement, giving employees a sense of purpose. 8. **Collaborative Environment**: Teamwork is a priority, creating a positive and productive atmosphere. 9. **Modern Facilities**: The workplace is comfortable, modern, and well-equipped. 10. **Job Security**: Maybank provides stability and financial security. In summary, Maybank is a community of passionate individuals working together to achieve common goals. If you seek a workplace that values employees, promotes growth, and makes a positive impact, Maybank is the place to be.

review_title: Good place to start a career
review_body_text: Cons - 24/7 standby - Take leave also need to be online - No work life balance Pros - A lot of benefits (claim, medical, bonus, salary) - Knowledgeable staff in their area - A lot if leave (hard to utilize)
Best workplace, supportive seniors, fun environment, lot of learning, good colleagues, high salary, best place to work, best place to retire, easy access
Maybank is a good company that provides good benefits . Friendly working environment. With the current development and system enhancement, we need to be agile.

supervisor too busy, need to be self-independent, not much can learn since I was interning at the branch and all customer's information is confidential, staff all friendly, the lunch break is 1 hour super short

review_title: Still the best bank for me ,& i would like to rejoin with the Maybank Group soon.TQ.
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? serve with our HEART🐯 exmaybankers What is the most stressful part about working at the company? Toxic environment & crowd situation What is the work environment and culture like at the company? Humanising & positive environment What is a typical day like for you at the company? Friday its a casual smart attire

review_title: sales target are high as your salary
review_body_text: too much gossip in each outlet. salary is very high and good stress level is 8 being a salesperson will definitely be super duper busy. staff benefits are very good. the HR system is so convenient.
pros_text: high salary and staff benefits are very good

review_body_text: Its not for everyone but the pay is good. If you can do sales and want to strive more this is the place for you. And if you can tahan kena maki also this place is for you. Hahaha

review_title: Positive productivity performance and always manages their time well.
review_body_text: I am thankful to my previous organization which is Maybank Berhad, because I have learnt a lot of things there. I enjoyed the people I worked with may
pros_text: These advantages can include stronger employee relationships as wellle.

review_title: Great place to start a career
review_body_text: Excellent entry point into the ASEAN financial industry. Management is efficient and effective in most matters. Guidance and learning opportunities are in abundance.

review_title: Fun workmate and lots of benefits
review_body_text: Good company to learn and i had great exposure of financial industry for my upcoming entry level career. Fun colleagues to work with. Good salary offered compared to another bank.
cons_text: Workload and less work life balance

review_body_text: As an IT, the rewards were less than Business/Investment related teams, but still slightly high than average rewards(bonus,salary). Work culture varies in departments, but mine was bad. When reported , the answer was, "this is banking". Mobility in departments is "faked" and only on paper.

review_title: A great position to enter banking industry
review_body_text: As a protege at branch, usually have to promote bank's products to customer (sales) and assist them for any inquiries. If can, do try to rotate and try other departments. You will learn a lot especially in the branch. They have limited offer of permanent absorption. With manager's recommendation, maybe you can join as Maybanker

review_title: Not easy but you can make it
review_body_text: As you know, sales is never easy. However, rezq js everywhere. The early process would be stressful as majority of the seniors wouldn't be a much of help once you start your target. Kind of independent. Relax and pick up your pace. If your branch environment did not help you, please ask to transfer. Your first step is very important. Speaking from my little experience, I do have the product knowledge but that alone is not enough. Support from surrounding is needed too BUT YOU MUST SHOW THE EFFORT. Else, they won't help you. Make sense? Good luck
Great workplace. Meet a lot of people there. The team I work with were great. Benefits are great. Fast pace working environment. Help me to develop a great skill set.
Very good and so much intertaining with mainly good condition and so much fun every day of the life work balance with the supportance of people and manager
